posts.text:
The Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act will expire soon.

FBI Directors Mueller, Comey, Wray, and even Patel have used this law to unconstitutionally snoop on Americans without getting a warrant.

It’s easily fixed if/when reauthorized by Congress.

Add 3 words: Get a Warrant!

I almost forgot… Happy pi day!

Reply with pi memes and jokes.

√-1   8   Σ   π

Did you ever study the Dewey decimal system and use the “card catalog index” to find a library book?

When you get a Real ID, they don’t ask for much information about you.

Real ID is your index card. They already have your book. They just need to unequivocally link YOU to IT.

Religious Liberty Commission member @CarriePrejean1 was reportedly removed for making statements that mirror remarks from the Pope.

Removing members for religious viewpoints undermines the very purpose of the Commission.

I’m asking two Congressional committees to review.

just a few of the things I strongly support:

✅The SAVE Act
✅National Constitutional Carry
✅Warrants for Americans for FISA
✅Reduce Spending
✅Convict Epstein Coconspirators
✅Healthy Food and Farm Freedom
✅Abolish the Federal Reserve
✅Border Security
✅Stop Fraud

.@TPUSA


Matt Kibbe (@MattKibbe)

Charlie Kirk: @MassieforKY is “one of my favorite members of Congress. He loves the Constitution, he loves liberty. He's honest and he's tough, and he's really gonna go after the intel agencies... Thomas Massie [is] just terrific.”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/MattKibbe/status/2032081516931461183#m

I’m on the Water Resources Subcommittee because there are 3 locks and dams and 280 miles of the Ohio River in KY’s 4th District.

Last week, I met with American Waterways Operators. @AWOAdvocacy represents the tugboat, towboat, & barge industry that keeps the Ohio River moving.

Thank you Tim. You’re going to get some hate for this, but the hate will come from bots and boughts, and the love will come from supporters of the Constitution.


Tim Pool (@Timcast)

Thomas Massie is a scholar and a gentleman



— https://nitter.net/Timcast/status/2032079250367393984#m

Yesterday, I had the privilege of visiting Russell Middle School and Russell High School in Greenup County, Kentucky, and speaking with students. I enjoyed answering their thoughtful questions and hearing their concerns.

When Congress votes to increase spending, they’re voting to increase your taxes,

because you’ll pay for the additional spending through inflation and debt and taxes later, if not through taxes today.

I’m the only Member of the House who hasn’t voted to increase your taxes.
Thank you, LMA CEO Forrest Mangan, LMA Director of Government and Industry Affairs Kevin Thielen, and LMA members Jim Akers, Jay Romine, and Helen Glover.

Recently, I met with members of @sellatauction, the Livestock Marketing Association.

I am a cosponsor of HR 4500, the HELP Act. This bill will cut red tape by exempting livestock haulers from rigid trucking rules that don't account for the realities of transporting live animals.

I had a great meeting with Kentucky @VFWHQ leaders Thomas Horseman, James Toebbe, Nicole Horseman, Darren Atkins, Amber Daniel & Nathan Sesco. I appreciate their advocacy for KY veterans.

We discussed the Major Richard Star Act & TAP Promotion Act, both of which I cosponsor.

I'll be on @55krc's "Brian Thomas Morning Show" today at 8:05 AM ET.  Tune in!

iheart.com/live/55krc-1709
Thank you to the employees of L&N Federal Credit Union, Members Choice Credit Union, and Commonwealth Credit Union for the visit.
